LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Elder.description: 长老是兄弟会战团的最高指挥官，负责所有战略决策、外交关系和战团的总体方向。他们将一生奉献给兄弟会的事业，并通过智慧、技能和对保护技术和保护人类的坚定奉献赢得了所有成员的尊重。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Elder.label: 长老
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Initiate.description: The lowest rank in the 钢铁兄弟会. Initiates are in training, learning the Brotherhood's ways and proving their worth. They perform basic duties and assist full members while earning the right to become a true Brother or Sister of Steel.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Initiate.label: 发起
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Knight.description: Knights are the Brotherhood's front-line warriors, fully trained in combat operations and the maintenance of power armor. They lead patrols, engage hostile forces, and recover pre-War technology from 危险 locations. Knights are the backbone of Brotherhood military strength.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Knight.label: 骑士
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Paladin.description: 圣骑士是兄弟会的精锐战士和战地指挥官。他们领导重大行动，在战斗中指挥骑士，并做出关键的战术决策。圣骑士身穿最精美的动力装甲，挥舞着最先进的武器，体现了兄弟会的军事力量和战术专长。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Paladin.label: 圣骑士
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Scribe.description: 抄写员是兄弟会的学者和技术人员，致力于保存和理解战前的技术。他们维护档案、研究文物并确保知识不会丢失。虽然抄写员主要不是战斗人员，但他们对兄弟会的使命至关重要。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_BoS_Scribe.label: 隶
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Champion.description: 里昂骄傲残余势力的领袖，通过行动而不是教条继承里昂长老的遗产。他们选择了同情而不是教条，选择了人性而不是传统，并且仍然是里昂长老的兄弟会服务而不是统治梦想的最后真正信徒。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Champion.label: 里昂的冠军
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Pride_Member.description: 里昂骄傲队的正式成员已经证明自己值得里昂长老的信任。他们为保护无辜者而战，并代表了兄弟会在为人类服务时所能达到的最佳状态。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Pride_Member.label: 骄傲会员
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Pride_Recruit.descriptio: 里昂骄傲的新成员发誓为里昂长老保护首都荒地的愿景而奋斗。新兵正在证明他们致力于保卫人类，而不仅仅是囤积技术。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Pride_Recruit.label: 招募
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Pride_Shield.description: 完全体现了里昂长老愿景的精英战士。他们是荒地社区和威胁他们的危险之间的盾牌，他们不是为了荣耀或技术而战，而是为了人类本身的生存。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Lyons_Pride_Shield.label: 人民之盾
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Outcast_Defender.description: 防御者是流放者的战斗专家，专注于保护技术和保卫流放者的设施。他们拒绝兄弟会转向人道主义，并严格专注于他们最初的使命。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Outcast_Defender.label: 后卫
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Outcast_Protector.description: 保护者领导着被驱逐者，维持铁的纪律和对技术保护的坚定承诺。它们代表了兄弟会最初使命的最纯粹形式，拒绝任何妥协或偏离创始人的愿景。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Outcast_Protector.label: 保护者
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Outcast_Specialist.description: 被遗弃者的入门等级。专家们已经证明了他们对兄弟会最初使命的承诺，即技术恢复高于一切。它们服务于流亡者以务实、严肃的方式保存战前知识。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Outcast_Specialist.label: 专家
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Captain.description: Senior field officers who command company-sized units. Captains are proven leaders with extensive combat experience. They handle complex operations and serve as the 英克雷's primary tactical commanders.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Captain.label: 队长
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Colonel.description: High-ranking officers who oversee strategic operations and base management. Colonels answer directly to the 英克雷 leadership and are responsible for executing the organization's broader objectives. They command respect and absolute authority.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Colonel.label: 上校
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Lieutenant.description: 负责排级行动的初级军官。中尉协调多个小队并在战场上做出战术决策。他们预计将展示战斗能力和领导能力。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Lieutenant.label: 中尉
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Private.description: The lowest rank in the 英克雷 military structure. Privates are frontline s老旧iers, trained in the use of advanced weaponry and power armor. They carry out orders without question and serve as the backbone of 英克雷 forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Private.label: 私人的
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Sergeant.description: Non-commissioned officers who lead s商场 squads in the field. Sergeants are experienced s老旧iers who maintain discipline and coordinate tactical operations. They bridge the gap between officers and enlisted personnel.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_Enclave_Sergeant.label: 军士
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_COL.description: 新加州共和国在没有政治盟友的情况下可以达到的最高级别。这是最高指挥职位之一，能够召集连级及更高级别的增援部队，包括特种部队。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_COL.label: NCR陆军上校
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_LT.description: 新加州共和国军官团中的第一军衔。这是最低的指挥位置，能够更快地呼叫增援和补给，质量和数量也更高。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_LT.label: NCR陆军中尉
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_PVT.description: 新加州共和国军队中的最低军衔。这个角色没有太多的尊重，薪水也不高。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_PVT.label: NCR 陆军列兵
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_Ranger_Patrolman.label: NCR游骑兵巡逻员
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_Ranger_Veteran.label: NCR 游骑兵老兵
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_Ranger_Volunteer.label: NCR 游骑兵志愿者
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_SGT.description: 新加州共和国士官队伍中的第一军衔。这是成为一名真正有权力、有责任的职业军人的第一步。
LanguageData.FCP_Title_NCR_SGT.label: NCR陆军中士
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_COL.description: The highest rank that achievable in the United States Army without a political ally. This is one of the highest command positions with the ability to call in reinforcements at the company level and higher including special forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_COL.label: US Army Colonel
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_LT.description: The first rank within the United States Army's commissioned officer corps. This is the lowest command position with the ability to call in reinforcements and supplies much faster and with greater quality and quantity.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_LT.label: US Army Lieutenant
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_PVT.description: The lowest rank within the United States Army. There isn't a lot of respect in this role, nor is the pay well.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_PVT.label: US Army Private
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_SGT.description: The first rank within the United States' non commissioned officer corps. This is the first step in a professional military carrer with reaL power and responsibilities.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Army_SGT.label: US Army Sergeant
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Marine_Colonel.label: US Marine Colonel
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Marine_PVT.description: The lowest rank within the United States Marine Corps. There isn't a lot of respect in this role, nor is the pay well.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Marine_PVT.label: US Marine Private
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Marine_Sergeant.descriptio: The first rank within the United States Marine Corps' non commissioned officer corps. This is the first step in a professional military career with real power and responsibilities.
LanguageData.FCP_Title_USA_Marine_Sergeant.label: US Marine Sergeant
